productDescription: Medium-staple ginned cotton fiber, 28mm length, suitable for ring spinning. Irrigated cultivation in Gujarat region.
comment: SAMPLE: Biogenic CO2 uptake reflects carbon sequestered during cotton plant growth. Land use change emissions not applicable (established farmland).

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Cotton cultivation (irrigation, fertilization, pest management), harvesting, ginning.

productDescription: Lyocell staple fiber, 1.3 dtex, 38mm cut length, produced in closed-loop solvent spinning process from sustainably sourced wood pulp.
comment: SAMPLE: Closed-loop solvent recovery >99%. FSC/PEFC certified wood pulp. Biogenic uptake from sustainably managed forests.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Wood pulp dissolution, NMMO solvent spinning, fiber washing, drying, crimping, cutting, baling.

productDescription: Virgin polyester staple fiber, 1.4 dtex, 38mm, semi-dull, suitable for blending with cotton. Produced from PTA and MEG via melt spinning.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: PTA/MEG polymerization, chip drying, melt spinning, drawing, crimping, heat setting, cutting, baling.

productDescription: Nylon 6,6 continuous filament yarn, 78dtex/68f, high-tenacity, for woven outerwear fabrics. Produced via adipic acid and hexamethylenediamine polymerization.
comment: SAMPLE: N2O abatement system installed on adipic acid line, reducing process N2O emissions by 98%.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Adipic acid production, HMDA synthesis, polymerization, melt spinning, drawing, texturing, winding.

productDescription: Fine merino wool yarn, 19.5µm, Nm 60/2, worsted spun, suitable for luxury knitwear and suiting. Australian greasy wool sourced.
comment: SAMPLE: Upstream sheep farming data from Australian Wool Innovation. Enteric methane included in biogenic non-CO2 emissions. Wool is a co-product (allocation by economic value).

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Greasy wool scouring, carbonizing, carding, combing, gilling, drawing, spinning, plying, winding.

productDescription: Recycled polyester staple fiber from post-consumer PET bottles, 1.5 dtex, 38mm, dope-dyed black. Certified GRS.
comment: SAMPLE: GRS 4.0 certified. Dope-dyeing eliminates separate dyeing step, saving water and energy vs. conventional dyeing.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: PET bottle collection, sorting, washing, flaking, extrusion, melt spinning, drawing, crimping, cutting.

productDescription: Viscose rayon staple fiber, 1.2 dtex, 38mm, bright luster. Produced from FSC-certified dissolving wood pulp.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Dissolving pulp production, alkali cellulose preparation, xanthation, dissolution, wet spinning, cutting, after-treatment, drying.

productDescription: Spandex (elastane) fiber, 40 denier, for stretch fabrics. Produced via dry spinning of segmented polyurethane.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: MDI synthesis, PTMEG production, prepolymer formation, chain extension, dry spinning, winding.

productDescription: Technical-grade flax fiber, retted and hackled, for composite reinforcement and high-performance textile applications.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Flax cultivation, pulling, retting (dew retting), scutching, hackling.

productDescription: High-performance spandex yarn, 20D-1120D range, offering superior stretch recovery. For intimate apparel and sportswear.

pcf.boundaryProcessesDescription: Polyurethane polymer synthesis, solution preparation, dry spinning, heat setting, winding, packaging.

productDescription: 100% combed cotton poplin fabric, 120 GSM, yarn-dyed, wrinkle-free finish. For dress shirts and blouses.
